Class TicketsPage

java.lang.Object
application.TicketsPage
public class TicketsPage extends Object
TicketsPage provides ticket management interface for instructors, staff, and admins. Instructors can create and reopen tickets. Admins can close tickets with resolution comments. All roles can view open and closed tickets.

  • Method Details

    • show

      public void show(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, User user)
      Displays the tickets page in the primary stage.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary stage where the scene will be displayed.
      user - The current user accessing the page.
